productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Boat Cc Lace Green Sports Shoes
description: Designed for the adventurer looking for more nimble and athletic adventure, the adidas Boat CC Lace is a waterproof shoe that features a quick-dry mesh upper and an insole drainage system that helps your feet stay dry and comfortable even in damp conditions.UpperQuick dry mesh upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for a breathable and comfortable Fit Strategically placed synthetic overlays for better foot protection and support Perforations on the overlays to drain out water and for better ventilation adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performance Wide lacing system for a snug, customized fit Meshed tongue with an EVA holder and meshed collar for in-step and dry comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for long term lightweight cushioning, with a mesh opening into the outsole to drain away water Perforated footbed to drain out water instantly and stitched to the upper to hold it in placeOutsoleTextuRed sticky Water Grip outsole that prevent slippage on damp surfaces Porus openings leading to the meshed midsole to ensure proper drainage of waterShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
